stemHtml: The main task of the fuel system is to…

options.a: Feed engines with fuel, run ground supply units, move fuel for mass and balance purposes
options.b: Feed engines with fuel, allowing refuelling and defueling, isolate tanks, allow fuel dumping, optimization of centre of gravity
options.c: Feed engines with fuel, heat up the aircraft, isolate tanks, allow fuel dumping
options.d: Feed engines with fuel, allowing refuelling and defueling, isolate tanks, allow fuel dumping, power in house electrical equipment
